product_updates.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
product_updates.content: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

product_updates.title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
product_updates.content: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.

product_updates.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
product_updates.content: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending. OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out…

product_updates.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
product_updates.content: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

product_updates.title: OpenAI’s Jalapeño chip is Big Tech’s spiciest move away from Nvidia
product_updates.content: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending. OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out…

product_updates.title: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
product_updates.content: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: brain-melting heatwaves and unprecedented OpenAI restrictions
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Heat waves mess with your brain. Scientists are trying to figure out why. —Jessica Hamzelou It’s been hot in London this week. Really hot. A dangerous heat wav…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Heat waves mess with your brain. Scientists are trying to figure out why.
technical_breakthroughs.content: It’s been hot in London this week. Really hot. A dangerous heat wave has hit Western Europe. Yesterday, the UK recorded its highest ever June temperature at 36.1 °C (about 97 °F). But as the weather app on my phone confirmed, it felt like 39 °C. It’s frightening that we are seeing such temperatur…
